exam_price_notes: SHRM member price $300. Non-member price $400. Senior-level credential.

testing_centers.notes: Computer-based testing at Prometric test centers or online proctored

id_requirements: One government-issued photo ID with name, signature, and date of birth. Name must match SHRM registration exactly.
exam_rules: Closed-book. No notes or reference materials. On-screen calculator provided. Proctor monitors throughout.
renewal_options: Complete 60 PDCs (Professional Development Credits) every 3 years. PDCs earned through HR-related education, community involvement, research, and volunteering. Or retake and pass the exam.

prerequisites.description: 3+ years in HR-related role with HR-related degree, OR 4+ years HR experience (without degree). Must be in a strategic decision-making or policy-implementing HR role.

retake_policy.notes: May attempt up to 3 times per testing window. SHRM exams offered twice per year (spring and winter windows). Full fee required for each retake.

official_study_resources.title: SHRM Learning System
official_study_resources.notes: Official comprehensive study program aligned to the SHRM Body of Applied Skills and Knowledge (BASK)
